response.overview: "BUDÔ" is the philosophy that guides all the Japanese martial arts and value more the human character formation above its physical training. Today, Martial Arts are treated as self-defense and figthing systems: an obsolete and inaproppriate vision of it. The objective of this movie is bring back the importance of BUDÔ as a philosphy with technique demonstrations, lessons from masters and traditional cerimonies on screen.
response.title: Budō
